name: Spectral Sovereign
description:
I was replaying Luigi’s Mansion on my Switch 2’s GameCube Classics collection, and I came to remember how much I love King Boo. I’d go as far as to say he’s one of my favorite Mario villains.

So to show my love, here’s a TF Scenario dedicated to him! By the way, the appearance of King Boo you’ll take is the Luigi’s Mansion version (specifically the coloration he has in Dark Moon because DARK MOON IS THE BEST GAME IN THE LUIGI’S MANSION SERIES AND I REFUSE TO BELIEVE OTHERWISE!)
creator: SacredSean
